title: YANASpec
description: YANA (Yet Another Node Automator) compiled specification document used by YANA Engine to apply configuration and automations on a target node

params.description: Named parameters that can be used in routines and actions. Parameters can be referenced using the syntax ${params:<param_name>}.

propertyNames.description: Parameter name must be a non-empty string containing only alphanumeric characters and underscores.

routines.description: Named sets of actions to be executed together as a single unit. The special dot-routine '.' is executed by default.

..description: Default routine executed when no routine is specified.

propertyNames.description: Routine name must be a non-empty string containing only alphanumeric characters and underscores.

routine.description: A named set of steps executed together as a single unit.

name.description: Human-readable name or label for this step.

action.description: The YANA action function to invoke.

args.description: Arguments to pass to the action function.
